body:
### Features
- **AI Guard:** Evaluating anthropic calls with AI guard automatically [#9219](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9219)
- **AI Guard:** Revert "Remove Anthropic auto-instrumentation" [#9495](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9495)
- **AppSec:** Report DD_APPSEC_AGENTIC_ONBOARDING in config telemetry [#9486](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9486)
- **ci:** Add code coverage report flags [#9418](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9418)
- **ci:** Add Test Optimization validation runbook [#9323](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9323)
- **express:** Surface repeated middleware next() as a span event [#9243](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9243)
- **Feature Flags:** Support agentless feature flag configuration [#9397](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9397)
- **frontdoor-agw:** Add implementation for Azure Frontdoor and App Gateway inferred spans [#9089](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9089)
- **graphql:** Add field schema coordinates [#9346](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9346)
- **LLM Observability:** Capture audio in messages and OpenAI chat completions [#9083](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9083)
- **LLM Observability:** Control-plane HTTP client for experiments [#9158](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9158)
- **LLM Observability:** Support ai sdk v7 embedMany operations [#9466](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9466)
- **OpenTelemetry:** Correct Next.js root request span naming [#9119](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9119)
- **Test Optimization:** Upload failure screenshots [#9433](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9433)

### Fixes
- **Feature Flags:** Support file-traced optional provider loading [#9324](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9324)
- **General:** Apply pm2_env env vars before tracer init [#8863](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8863)
- **General:** Preserve ESM export aliases [#9436](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9436)
- **graphql:** Preserve hook error overrides [#9435](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9435)
- **LLM Observability:** Fix infinite recursion when using `BedrockChatLanguageModel` [#9487](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9487)
- **loader:** Defer instrumentation graph during preload [#9485](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9485)
- **nyc:** Preserve report generation failures [#9337](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9337)
- **standalone:** Stamp _dd.apm.enabled on every exported chunk [#9483](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9483)
- **Test Optimization:** Clear policies after settings failure [#9347](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9347)
- **Test Optimization:** Harden RUM correlation failures [#9408](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9408)
- **Test Optimization:** Release removed replay probes [#9336](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9336)
- **Test Optimization:** Restore manual test context [#9356](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9356)
- **Test Optimization:** Support NODE_OPTIONS auto-instrumentation [#9371](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9371)
- **Test Optimization:** Support numeric retries with ATR [#9484](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9484)
- **Test Optimization:** Support version 13.2 [#9456](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9456)

### Performance
- **graphql:** Reuse path-string cache for collapsed fields [#9401](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9401)

### Documentation
- **electron:** Replace README with internal-use-only notice on publish [#9407](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9407)
- **orchestrion:** Refresh AST-rewriter reference for current engine [#9133](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9133)

### Internal (CI, Testing, Benchmarking)
- **AppSec:** Deflake RASP SSRF "should not detect threat" express tests [#9417](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9417)
- **AppSec:** Drop redundant yarn install from sourcemap test [#9448](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9448)
- **ci:** Tolerate coverage preload in clean env tests [#9429](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9429)
- **couchbase, kafkajs:** Wait for client readiness [#9455](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9455)
- **coverage:** Warm source maps before process exit [#9330](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9330)
- **Dependencies:** Bump @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk [#9474](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9474)
- **Dependencies:** Bump brace-expansion [#9452](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9452)
- **Dependencies:** Bump bullmq [#9471](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9471)
- **Dependencies:** Bump import-in-the-middle to 3.3.2 [#9447](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9447)
- **Dependencies:** Bump the vendor-minor-and-patch-dependencies group across 1 directory with 3 updates [#9470](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9470)
- **electron:** Give HTTP trace assertions the same timeout as IPC tests [#9409](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9409)
- **electron:** Stabilize flaky CI (install/apt retries, IPC teardown) [#9316](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9316)
- **General:** Assert DD_APPSEC_AGENTIC_ONBOARDING in v5 appsec config [#9489](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9489)
- **General:** Bind mock server to tracer address [#9400](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9400)
- **General:** Isolate span sampling rules fixture [#9430](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9430)
- **General:** Run package scripts with npm [#9405](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9405)
- **General:** Update eslint unicorn plugin to v65 [#8838](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8838)
- **General:** Update one-pipeline to 1.1.0 [#9438](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9438)
- **General:** Validate CPU percentage against process usage [#9289](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9289)
- **init:** Guard fixture source logging [#9269](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9269)
- **LLM Observability:** Bump tested openai version with new cassettes [#9439](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9439)
- **workflows:** Add dd-octo-sts chainguard policy files [#8438](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8438)
- **workflows:** Replace GITHUB_TOKEN with dd-octo-sts [#8432](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8432)
